case_title: ROBERT RIVKIN VS. BANK OF THE WEST

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-24-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-24-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF ROBERT RIVKIN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BANK OF THE WEST IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY WILLIAM GARDNER, BRANCH MANAGER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-24-2022 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $49.95) SERVED DEC-21-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BANK OF THE WEST
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT BANK OF THE WEST
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $500.00 FILED BY RIVKIN, ROBERT AS TO DEFENDANT BANK OF THE WEST ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-24-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY DEFENDANT BANK OF THE WEST

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RIVKIN, ROBERT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BANK OF THE WEST $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $79.95 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $579.95 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
